author: audit-agent

patch.value: The capture_level field exists in settings.telemetry but is only copied into the command_start payload. No code branches on minimal/redacted/max to actually reduce data collection. This means the setting is misleading - users who set capture_level to minimal still have full data collected.
Enforce telemetry capture_level setting in runtime event collection
capture_level (minimal/redacted/max) is stored in settings but not enforced. The runtime always collects max-level data regardless of the setting.
capture_level minimal: only command name and duration. redacted: current behavior. max: full payload.

message: Found during 2026-04-26 dogfood audit - capture_level not enforced
